name: aether-game-utils (ubuntu_clang)
initializeCommand: bash -lc 'if [ -n "${localEnv:GHCR_USER}" ] && [ -n "${localEnv:GHCR_TOKEN}" ]; then echo "${localEnv:GHCR_TOKEN}" | docker login ghcr.io -u "${localEnv:GHCR_USER}" --password-stdin; else echo "GHCR auth not configured. Set Codespaces secrets GHCR_USER and GHCR_TOKEN."; exit 1; fi'
